title: Karl Marx: Life, Ideas, and Historical Context

content.title: Linking Experience to Theory
content.purpose: Analyse how Marx's life experiences shaped his ideas.
content.learner_task: Complete the cause–effect table using task cards. Explain how each experience influenced Marx's thinking.

task_cards.title: Card 2
task_cards.text: How did this influence his ideas?

task_cards.title: Card 4
task_cards.text: How did this shape Marx's work?

task_cards.title: Card 6
task_cards.text: How did this influence his critique?

cause_effect_table.heading: Cause–Effect Table
cause_effect_table.table:
| Experience | What Marx Observed | Resulting Idea |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Exile | | |
| Collaboration | | |
| Industrial Context | | |

content.expected_output: A completed table showing clear causal links between experiences and ideas.
content.support_note: Use cause-and-effect language such as 'this led to' or 'this influenced'.

content.title: Comparing Marx's Major Works
content.learner_task: Complete the comparison table using prompts and identify differences and similarities.

materials.comparison_prompts:
### Prompts

- What is the purpose of each work?
- Who is the audience?
- What is the style?
- What is the focus?

comparison_table.heading: Comparison Table
comparison_table.table:
| Feature | Communist Manifesto | Das Kapital |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Purpose | | |
| Audience | | |
| Style | | |
| Focus | | |

content.expected_output: A completed comparison showing clear distinctions between the two works.
content.support_note: Focus especially on political vs analytical purpose.

content.title: Explaining Marx's Core Concepts
content.purpose: Apply Marx's ideas to a real-world scenario and evaluate their relevance.
content.learner_task: Read the scenario and write a 150–200 word explanation using the checklist.

scenario.heading: Factory Scenario
scenario.content: Workers in a London factory work long hours under strict supervision. The owner controls wages and production.

content.expected_output: A short explanation linking concepts and ending with a clear evaluative statement.
content.support_note: Ensure concepts are connected, not described in isolation.
